title: aurantium decumana
intro: Aurantium decumana, also known as the bitter orange tree, is a species of citrus tree native to China and Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of aurantium decumana include its ability to act as a bitter tonic, aiding digestion and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Aurantium decumana can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
